locations.name: 亚速尔群岛
locations.summary: 亚速尔（葡萄牙語：Açores），正式名称為亞速爾自治區（Região Autónoma dos Açores），是位於北大西洋中央的一個群島，葡萄牙两个自治区之一，其行政首府為聖米格爾島上的蓬塔德爾加達。該群島由九個主要島嶼組成，東距葡…

locations.name: 大西洋
locations.summary: 大西洋，即亚特兰蒂斯洋（英語：Atlantic Ocean），是世界第二大洋。原面積8221萬7千平方公里，在南冰洋確立後，面積調整為7676萬2千平方公里。平均深度3,646米，最深處波多黎各海沟深達8,605米。從赤道南北分為北大西洋…

relations.subject: Barolo shearwater
relations.evidence: The Barolo shearwater (Puffinus baroli), also known as the North Atlantic little shearwater or Macaronesian shearwater, is a small shearwater which breeds in the Azores and Canaries of Macaronesia in the North Atlantic Ocean

relations.subject: Barolo shearwater
relations.evidence: Like other Procellariforms, introduced predators, such as rats and cats, are their main threat at breeding colonies
